extra.reason: Decided Option B: centralized ~/Documents/conceptify/artifacts/<project-id>/ storage; rationale in notes and prd.md §12
Scaffold complete: Tauri 2.11 + Preact + Tailwind v4 (stable) + Vite; dev loop and release .app bundle verified

axum 0.8 API embedded in Tauri setup hook: /health unauthenticated, bearer-token auth (0600 token file), port fallback 4477-4487 with defer-to-existing-instance, port file, event emission wired; all acceptance criteria verified

rusqlite + WAL + 6 idempotent migrations implementing the full §4 schema with CHECK/FK constraints; DbHandle shared via Tauri managed state to both tauri commands and axum handlers; verified live + via cargo test

CLI skeleton complete: workspace (src-tauri + conceptify-types + conceptify-cli), launch-and-wait contract, 'conceptify status' verified E2E <10ms; app binary renamed conceptify-app to resolve target/ collision
justfile with dev/build/install-cli (+check) verified from clean state; install-cli symlinks to ~/.local/bin, fresh-shell 'conceptify status' works

single-instance (registered first), hide-on-close via CloseRequested+prevent_close, macOS Reopen restore, window-state plugin; default menu Quit exits (ExitRequested not intercepted); verified live where headless allows
All 7 children closed: app cold-launches with axum API + WAL SQLite, CLI probe-launch-poll contract verified E2E, lifecycle plugins wired, justfile entry points working

Projects API complete: ensure (canonicalized identity + name dedup), list (thread_count/last_activity, archived filter), rename, archive/unarchive; projects-changed events; all criteria verified live; types shared via conceptify-types
